data.name: Sexy Nurse Puzzle
data.detailed_description:
CHECK OUR FRIEND'S GAME 👀


關於此遊戲

Sexy Nurse Puzzle is a short puzzle game with a beautiful and hot nurse. High-quality art, relaxing music and spicy atmosphere. Awesome for relax after a day at work.

Features:
• Simple and additive Gameplay
• Original HD Artworks
• Relaxing music
• The best way to spend your night alone!

data.short_description: Not every trip to the hospital has to be an unpleasant experience. Especially when such a nurse is dealing with you!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 98, ME, 2000, XP and Vista, 7
  • 處理器: 500 MHz
  • 記憶體: 125 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 730
  • 儲存空間: 256 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
